title: Spring Welcome Dinner
description: Join us for a warm welcome dinner with home-cooked food and new friends. Meet local families and other international students.
descriptionZh: 加入我们的欢迎晚宴，品尝家常菜，结识新朋友。认识当地家庭和其他国际学生。

title: Campus Tour & Coffee
description: Explore campus with a local guide, then grab coffee together. Learn where everything is before classes start!
descriptionZh: 和当地向导一起探索校园，然后一起喝咖啡。在开学前了解校园的一切！

title: Banking & Phone Setup Workshop
titleZh: 银行开户与手机办理工作坊
description: We'll walk you through opening a bank account and getting a phone plan. Volunteers will accompany you to the bank!
descriptionZh: 我们将带你了解如何开设银行账户和办理手机卡。志愿者会陪你去银行！

title: Grocery Store Trip
description: Need groceries but not sure where to go? Join us for a group trip to the supermarket and Asian grocery store.
descriptionZh: 需要买菜但不知道去哪里？加入我们的超市购物团，一起去超市和亚洲超市。
location: Meet at Student Union Parking Lot
